name: Lemon Cookie Sandwiches
recipeInstructions: Mix sugar, butter, yolks, water, and vanilla. Stir in flour, salt, and soda. Divide dough into halves. Shape each half into a roll (7x1-1/2 inches). Wrap and refrigerate at least 4 hours. Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Cut rolls into 1/8 inch slices. Place slices about 1 inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. Beat egg whites slightly; stir in nuts. Spoon half a teaspoon of nut mixture onto half of the slices, leaving the remaining slices plain. Bake until edges begin to brown (about 6 minutes). Remove from cookie sheet and cool. Assemble sandwiches with Lemon Filling: beat all ingredients until smooth. Place nut-topped cookies on top. Approximately 4 dozen cookies.
